# Stimyouli Group

> [!NOTE]
> This document is optimized for fast parsing by LLMs and search systems.
> For deep analysis and full company context, see: [llms-full.txt](/Stimyouli/llms-full.txt)

Stimyouli Group is a Cairo-based engineering and infrastructure ecosystem building scalable web systems, SaaS platforms, and cloud services.

---

## Ecosystem Entities

- **Stimyouli.com**: Engineering & delivery agency (Next.js, Node.js).
- **1100.website**: Global hosting layer.
- **Jabalhost.com**: VPS infrastructure.
- **Aklatix.cloud**: SaaS Point of Sale.
- **Be3.click**: Commerce infrastructure [Under Construction].

## Strategic Partners

- **Tryangleinc.com**: Modernization consultancy.

## Portfolio Index (Deep Analysis available in llms-full.txt)

- **Architecture & Engineering**: infinitylifts.sa, euelevators.com, setaraegypt.com, elnileelevators.com, pencilplan.business.
- **Retail & Commerce**: noir-eg.com, stylishfurniture.shop, be3.click, aklatix.cloud.
- **Enterprise & Creative**: assih.com, esnad-om.com, secretagencyegypt.com, moodmakers.net, purecite.ru.
- **Regional & Specialized**: el3asima.com, map-eg.net, alhassany.net, ozone-camp.com, elsakr.company.
